content: Treelite (dmlc) 4.x is the exchange format for tree ensembles feeding NVIDIA FIL / Triton FIL backend. Two paths: import_from_json() with a correctly-formatted JSON string (documented for custom/unsupported models like CatBoost), and the checkpoint serialization format consumed by FIL. To make Sylva models FIL-servable, emit Treelite-compatible JSON matching task_param/model_param/tree node schema.
